description_long: This object is a modern vehicle wheel featuring a wide, smooth black rubber tire mounted on a glossy black alloy rim. The rim displays a five-spoke design with each spoke radiating symmetrically from a central hub, which is branded with a visible logo. The tire appears to be slick, lacking any visible tread pattern, suggesting it is designed for high-performance or racing applications. The rim has a deep lip, giving it a concave profile, and the spokes are robust and slightly angular, contributing to a sporty aesthetic. The central hub area is exposed, with visible lug nut holes arranged in a circular pattern. The overall finish is sleek and reflective, with the materials primarily consisting of rubber and metal.
description: A wide, slick black tire mounted on a glossy five-spoke alloy rim with a deep concave profile and exposed central hub. The design is sporty and modern, with a smooth, treadless surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, wide black tire with no visible tread or rim details.
description_view_1: Front view revealing the five-spoke glossy black rim, central hub with logo, and exposed lug nut holes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the smooth, wide tire profile without rim or hub details.
description_view_3: Rear view of the wheel, displaying the inner rim structure and central hub area, but with less detail than the front.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five evenly spaced, straight spokes radiating symmetrically from the central hub in a classic star pattern.
attribute_rim_design: Deep concave profile with a glossy black finish, smooth outer lip, and no visible decorative elements or beadlock; single-piece construction.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut holes arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Completely slick surface with no visible grooves, blocks, or sipes; designed for maximum contact on smooth surfaces.
